description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 extra Energy this turn.
flavor_text: It hums with the silence between stars.

description: At the start of each combat, apply 1 Vulnerable to all enemies.
flavor_text: The crown speaks to those willing to listen.

description: Whenever you play a Power card, draw 1 card.
flavor_text: Its threads extend through every possible future.

description: Start each combat with 4 extra Block.
flavor_text: A fragment of absolute nothingness made solid.

description: When you draw your 3rd card each turn, gain 1 Energy.
flavor_text: Crystallised potential harvested from a collapsed dimension.

description: At the start of each combat, draw 1 extra card.
flavor_text: It illuminates darkness that shouldn't exist.

description: Whenever you exhaust a card, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
flavor_text: The words change every time you read it.

description: Gain 25 Gold. Whenever you gain Gold, gain 1 less.
At the start of your turn, gain 2 Block.
flavor_text: Keeps you tethered when the void wants to pull you in.

description: You can see enemy intent 1 turn ahead.
Your first Attack card each turn deals 5 extra damage.
Boss Relic. Start each act with 1 extra permanent Energy.
Event Relic. Once per combat, when you would die, heal to 1 HP instead.
flavor_text: Not even death is certain in the void.
